form.name: Cards
form.script:
-- ============================================================ -- FUNCOES AUXILIARES -- ============================================================
local function atualizarImagem(campo, tabela) local nome = sheet[campo .. "Nome"] or "" if nome ~= "" and tabela[nome] and tabela[nome] ~= "" then sheet[campo .. "URL"] = tabela[nome] end end
local function atualizarImagemClass(campo, tier) local nome = sheet[campo .. "Nome"] or "" if nome == "" then return end local tabela if tier == "F" then tabela = imagensFoundation elseif tier == "S" then tabela = imagensSpecialization elseif tier == "M" then tabela = imagensMastery end if tabela and tabela[nome] and tabela[nome] ~= "" then sheet[campo .. "URL"] = tabela[nome] end end
local function atualizarImagemDomain(slotNum) local carta = sheet["cardDomain" .. slotNum .. "Nome"] or "" if carta ~= "" and imagensDomainCards[carta] and imagensDomainCards[carta] ~= "" then sheet["cardDomain" .. slotNum .. "URL"] = imagensDomainCards[carta] end end
local function filtrarCartasDomain(slotNum) local categoria = sheet["cardDomain" .. slotNum .. "Categoria"] or "" local combo = self:findControlByName("cbDomain" .. slotNum .. "Nome")
if combo == nil then return end
local cards = domainCardsByCategory[categoria] if cards == nil then return end
local items = {"-- Carta --"} local values = {""}
for _, cardName in ipairs(cards) do local fullName = "[" .. categoria .. "] " .. cardName table.insert(items, fullName) table.insert(values, fullName) end
combo.items = items combo.values = values end

comboBox.items: {'-- Selecione --', '== BARD ==', 'Troubadour (F)', 'Wordsmith (F)', '== DRUID ==', 'Warden of the Elements (F)', 'Warden of Renewal (F)', '== GUARDIAN ==', 'Stalwart (F)', 'Vengeance (F)', '== RANGER ==', 'Beastbound (F)', 'Wayfinder (F)', '== ROGUE ==', 'Nightwalker (F)', 'Syndicate (F)', '== SERAPH ==', 'Divine Wielder (F)', 'Winged Sentinel (F)', '== SORCERER ==', 'Elemental Origin (F)', 'Primal Origin (F)', '== WARRIOR ==', 'Call of the Brave (F)', 'Call of the Slayer (F)', '== WIZARD ==', 'School of Knowledge (F)', 'School of War (F)'}
comboBox.values: {'', '', 'Troubadour (F)', 'Wordsmith (F)', '', 'Warden of the Elements (F)', 'Warden of Renewal (F)', '', 'Stalwart (F)', 'Vengeance (F)', '', 'Beastbound (F)', 'Wayfinder (F)', '', 'Nightwalker (F)', 'Syndicate (F)', '', 'Divine Wielder (F)', 'Winged Sentinel (F)', '', 'Elemental Origin (F)', 'Primal Origin (F)', '', 'Call of the Brave (F)', 'Call of the Slayer (F)', '', 'School of Knowledge (F)', 'School of War (F)'}

comboBox.items: {'-- Selecione --', '=== FOUNDATION ===', '== BARD ==', 'Troubadour (F)', 'Wordsmith (F)', '== DRUID ==', 'Warden of the Elements (F)', 'Warden of Renewal (F)', '== GUARDIAN ==', 'Stalwart (F)', 'Vengeance (F)', '== RANGER ==', 'Beastbound (F)', 'Wayfinder (F)', '== ROGUE ==', 'Nightwalker (F)', 'Syndicate (F)', '== SERAPH ==', 'Divine Wielder (F)', 'Winged Sentinel (F)', '== SORCERER ==', 'Elemental Origin (F)', 'Primal Origin (F)', '== WARRIOR ==', 'Call of the Brave (F)', 'Call of the Slayer (F)', '== WIZARD ==', 'School of Knowledge (F)', 'School of War (F)', '=== SPECIALIZATION ===', '== BARD ==', 'Troubadour (S)', 'Wordsmith (S)', '== DRUID ==', 'Warden of the Elements (S)', 'Warden of Renewal (S)', '== GUARDIAN ==', 'Stalwart (S)', 'Vengeance (S)', '== RANGER ==', 'Beastbound (S)', 'Wayfinder (S)', '== ROGUE ==', 'Nightwalker (S)', 'Syndicate (S)', '== SERAPH ==', 'Divine Wielder (S)', 'Winged Sentinel (S)', '== SORCERER ==', 'Elemental Origin (S)', 'Primal Origin (S)', '== WARRIOR ==', 'Call of the Brave (S)', 'Call of the Slayer (S)', '== WIZARD ==', 'School of Knowledge (S)', 'School of War (S)'}
comboBox.values: {'', '', '', 'Troubadour (F)', 'Wordsmith (F)', '', 'Warden of the Elements (F)', 'Warden of Renewal (F)', '', 'Stalwart (F)', 'Vengeance (F)', '', 'Beastbound (F)', 'Wayfinder (F)', '', 'Nightwalker (F)', 'Syndicate (F)', '', 'Divine Wielder (F)', 'Winged Sentinel (F)', '', 'Elemental Origin (F)', 'Primal Origin (F)', '', 'Call of the Brave (F)', 'Call of the Slayer (F)', '', 'School of Knowledge (F)', 'School of War (F)', '', '', 'Troubadour (S)', 'Wordsmith (S)', '', 'Warden of the Elements (S)', 'Warden of Renewal (S)', '', 'Stalwart (S)', 'Vengeance (S)', '', 'Beastbound (S)', 'Wayfinder (S)', '', 'Nightwalker (S)', 'Syndicate (S)', '', 'Divine Wielder (S)', 'Winged Sentinel (S)', '', 'Elemental Origin (S)', 'Primal Origin (S)', '', 'Call of the Brave (S)', 'Call of the Slayer (S)', '', 'School of Knowledge (S)', 'School of War (S)'}

dataLink.event: local nome = sheet.cardClass2Nome or "" if nome:find("%(F%)") then atualizarImagemClass('cardClass2', 'F') elseif nome:find("%(S%)") then atualizarImagemClass('cardClass2', 'S') end

comboBox.items: {'-- Selecione --', '=== FOUNDATION ===', '== BARD ==', 'Troubadour (F)', 'Wordsmith (F)', '== DRUID ==', 'Warden of the Elements (F)', 'Warden of Renewal (F)', '== GUARDIAN ==', 'Stalwart (F)', 'Vengeance (F)', '== RANGER ==', 'Beastbound (F)', 'Wayfinder (F)', '== ROGUE ==', 'Nightwalker (F)', 'Syndicate (F)', '== SERAPH ==', 'Divine Wielder (F)', 'Winged Sentinel (F)', '== SORCERER ==', 'Elemental Origin (F)', 'Primal Origin (F)', '== WARRIOR ==', 'Call of the Brave (F)', 'Call of the Slayer (F)', '== WIZARD ==', 'School of Knowledge (F)', 'School of War (F)', '=== SPECIALIZATION ===', '== BARD ==', 'Troubadour (S)', 'Wordsmith (S)', '== DRUID ==', 'Warden of the Elements (S)', 'Warden of Renewal (S)', '== GUARDIAN ==', 'Stalwart (S)', 'Vengeance (S)', '== RANGER ==', 'Beastbound (S)', 'Wayfinder (S)', '== ROGUE ==', 'Nightwalker (S)', 'Syndicate (S)', '== SERAPH ==', 'Divine Wielder (S)', 'Winged Sentinel (S)', '== SORCERER ==', 'Elemental Origin (S)', 'Primal Origin (S)', '== WARRIOR ==', 'Call of the Brave (S)', 'Call of the Slayer (S)', '== WIZARD ==', 'School of Knowledge (S)', 'School of War (S)', '=== MASTERY ===', '== BARD ==', 'Troubadour (M)', 'Wordsmith (M)', '== DRUID ==', 'Warden of the Elements (M)', 'Warden of Renewal (M)', '== GUARDIAN ==', 'Stalwart (M)', 'Vengeance (M)', '== RANGER ==', 'Beastbound (M)', 'Wayfinder (M)', '== ROGUE ==', 'Nightwalker (M)', 'Syndicate (M)', '== SERAPH ==', 'Divine Wielder (M)', 'Winged Sentinel (M)', '== SORCERER ==', 'Elemental Origin (M)', 'Primal Origin (M)', '== WARRIOR ==', 'Call of the Brave (M)', 'Call of the Slayer (M)', '== WIZARD ==', 'School of Knowledge (M)', 'School of War (M)'}
comboBox.values: {'', '', '', 'Troubadour (F)', 'Wordsmith (F)', '', 'Warden of the Elements (F)', 'Warden of Renewal (F)', '', 'Stalwart (F)', 'Vengeance (F)', '', 'Beastbound (F)', 'Wayfinder (F)', '', 'Nightwalker (F)', 'Syndicate (F)', '', 'Divine Wielder (F)', 'Winged Sentinel (F)', '', 'Elemental Origin (F)', 'Primal Origin (F)', '', 'Call of the Brave (F)', 'Call of the Slayer (F)', '', 'School of Knowledge (F)', 'School of War (F)', '', '', 'Troubadour (S)', 'Wordsmith (S)', '', 'Warden of the Elements (S)', 'Warden of Renewal (S)', '', 'Stalwart (S)', 'Vengeance (S)', '', 'Beastbound (S)', 'Wayfinder (S)', '', 'Nightwalker (S)', 'Syndicate (S)', '', 'Divine Wielder (S)', 'Winged Sentinel (S)', '', 'Elemental Origin (S)', 'Primal Origin (S)', '', 'Call of the Brave (S)', 'Call of the Slayer (S)', '', 'School of Knowledge (S)', 'School of War (S)', '', '', 'Troubadour (M)', 'Wordsmith (M)', '', 'Warden of the Elements (M)', 'Warden of Renewal (M)', '', 'Stalwart (M)', 'Vengeance (M)', '', 'Beastbound (M)', 'Wayfinder (M)', '', 'Nightwalker (M)', 'Syndicate (M)', '', 'Divine Wielder (M)', 'Winged Sentinel (M)', '', 'Elemental Origin (M)', 'Primal Origin (M)', '', 'Call of the Brave (M)', 'Call of the Slayer (M)', '', 'School of Knowledge (M)', 'School of War (M)'}

dataLink.event: local nome = sheet.cardClass3Nome or "" if nome:find("%(F%)") then atualizarImagemClass('cardClass3', 'F') elseif nome:find("%(S%)") then atualizarImagemClass('cardClass3', 'S') elseif nome:find("%(M%)") then atualizarImagemClass('cardClass3', 'M') end

button.event: sheet.cardDomain1URL = "" sheet.cardDomain1Categoria = "" sheet.cardDomain1Nome = "" local combo = self:findControlByName("cbDomain1Nome") if combo then combo.items = {"-- Selecione Dominio --"} combo.values = {""} end

sheet.cardDomain2URL = "" sheet.cardDomain2Categoria = "" sheet.cardDomain2Nome = "" local combo = self:findControlByName("cbDomain2Nome") if combo then combo.items = {"-- Selecione Dominio --"} combo.values = {""} end

sheet.cardDomain3URL = "" sheet.cardDomain3Categoria = "" sheet.cardDomain3Nome = "" local combo = self:findControlByName("cbDomain3Nome") if combo then combo.items = {"-- Selecione Dominio --"} combo.values = {""} end

sheet.cardDomain4URL = "" sheet.cardDomain4Categoria = "" sheet.cardDomain4Nome = "" local combo = self:findControlByName("cbDomain4Nome") if combo then combo.items = {"-- Selecione Dominio --"} combo.values = {""} end

sheet.cardDomain5URL = "" sheet.cardDomain5Categoria = "" sheet.cardDomain5Nome = "" local combo = self:findControlByName("cbDomain5Nome") if combo then combo.items = {"-- Selecione Dominio --"} combo.values = {""} end
